title: Wide-Wake Turbine Siting: Maximize the Thinnest Wake Triangle
strategies: ring baseline: place turbines equally spaced on a circle inscribed in the field (reproduces the checker baseline, ~0.1)
incremental spacing: insert turbines one at a time, each at the grid candidate that maximizes the current thinnest wake triangle
annealed relaxation: start from the incremental layout, then hill-climb the binding (thinnest) triangle's vertices with seeded random moves to enlarge the minimum area
invalid: emit turbines outside the field / wrong count (scores 0)
